title: cli: catch usage and command-not-found errors
body:
- don't print help message for usage errors
 - catch command-not-found errors
 - pod create: restore help flag

comments.body:
Does not work for podman command.

```
podman --foobar
```
Prints help followed by the error.

```
Also looks like we loss one of the `-`
./bin/podman run --foobar
flag provided but not defined: -foobar
See 'podman run --help'.
```


```
This preexists.  But it would be nice to get something for this.
./bin/podman pod run
No help topic for 'run'
```

```
This command is printing help
podman pod create --foobar
```

```
podman container ls --foobar
Prints help
```

@rhatdan, thanks for testing!

> Also looks like we loss one of the `-`
```
./bin/podman run --foobar
flag provided but not defined: -foobar
See 'podman run --help'.
```
This predates this change. Docker doesn't have the problem as it doesn't use `urfave/cli`.

I will have a look at the other issues.

I missed setting the error handler for the app, which fixed the undefined flag issues.

I'll check what we can do for:
```
./bin/podman pod run
No help topic for 'run'
```

Things are looking better now:

Command not found handling:
```
# ./bin/podman pod run
Command "run" not found.
See `podman pod --help`.

Command "123" not found.
See `podman --help`.
```

Usage error handling:
```
flag needs an argument: -conmon
See 'podman --help'.

flag needs an argument: -h
See 'podman run --help'.

# ./bin/podman pod create --cgroup-parent
flag needs an argument: -cgroup-parent
See 'podman pod create --help'.
```

Great work @vrothberg.
LGTM

We have a separate bug in         "github.com/urfave/cli"
where it is reporting the --options as -options.
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit 95a6bd8 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 95a6bd86830e7915e3eaafb4bb0722102839165a -->

Thanks, @rhatdan!

I think that `urfave/cli` can't do much unless they're moving away from golang's `flag` package. I hope to find time to work on https://github.com/golang/go/issues/26822, which could help as well but only for future versions of go.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/containers/libpod/a34d6b54fa8aa17c16b97ac6765bbe251522746d.1535712224968378368/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing a34d6b54fa8aa17c16b97ac6765bbe251522746d to master...
